message:
Merge pull request #244 from kubestellar/preview-23

try to fix cleanup routine delete not finding image

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-name: CI/CD Build & PR Preview Pipeline
+name: CI/CD Build, PR Preview, and Container Cleanup Pipeline
 
 on:
   push:
@@ -224,8 +224,11 @@ jobs:
           EXISTING_IMAGE=$(oci artifacts container image list \
             --repository-name "kubestellar-docs-prs" \
             --compartment-id "${{ secrets.OCI_CLI_TENANCY }}" \
-            --query 'data.items[?contains("display-name", `pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}`)].id' \
+            --query 'data.items[?contains("display-name", `pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}`)].id | [0]' \
             --raw-output)
+
+          echo "Found image ID: $EXISTING_IMAGE"
+
           if [ -n "$EXISTING_IMAGE" ]; then
             echo "existing=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
             echo "✅ Found existing preview image."
@@ -364,8 +367,11 @@ jobs:
           IMAGE_IDS=$(oci artifacts container image list \
             --repository-name "kubestellar-docs-prs" \
             --compartment-id "${{ secrets.OCI_CLI_TENANCY }}" \
-            --query 'data.items[?contains("display-name", `pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}`)].id' \
+            --query 'data.items[?contains("display-name", `pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}`)].id | [0]' \
             --raw-output)
+
+          echo "Found image IDs: $IMAGE_IDS"
+
           if [ -z "$IMAGE_IDS" ]; then
             echo "No image found for PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"
           else
